title: UI Control
description: Easily customize and sweep your GUI.
body:
## About

This mod lets you customize the buttons in both the Title Menu and the Pause Menu.
The main goal of the mod is to clean up, simplify and **configure** your UI as you like.

Check out the gallery for some great examples of what you can achieve with this mod.

## Compatability

It should be compatible with almost all UI mods that don’t heavily alter the interface  
For example, [Essentials](https://modrinth.com/mod/essentials) and similar mods will work, but not something like [Alan's Unified UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/alan-unified-ui).

Requires [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for any configurations.  
If you’re using [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback) older than v0.36.0 you need to use [Flashside](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashside) in order to make them compatible.
